raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "box_2",
    "Action concept": "Stabilize",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "Both arms are free, and there is unobstructed lateral access to the sides of box_2 which rests on top of box_1. Sufficient clearance exists so the robot can bring both end-effectors in contact with the box without colliding with other objects or the table.",
    "Postcondition": "Box_2 is gently constrained between the inner surfaces of the robot’s two palms, preventing accidental sliding while the attachment to box_1 is released."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 2,
    "Target": "box_2",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "Box_2 is already stabilized by the robot. The attachment (e.g., light tape) can be overcome by an upward and slight twisting pull. No objects block the vertical lift path above box_2.",
    "Postcondition": "Box_2 is fully detached from box_1 and securely held in mid-air by both end-effectors."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 3,
    "Target": "On the table, front-right of box_1",
    "Action concept": "Place",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "vertically",
    "Precondition": "Robot is holding box_2. The designated table region front-right of box_1 is clear and large enough (≥30×30 cm) to accommodate the box without overhang.",
    "Postcondition": "Box_2 rests stably on the cleared tabletop area, leaving box_1 completely exposed and accessible. The robot releases its hold on box_2."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 4,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "Box_1 is now free of any object above it. Both arms can approach its lateral faces without obstruction, and there is vertical clearance to lift the box.",
    "Postcondition": "Box_1 (the darker box) is securely held off the table by the robot’s two end-effectors, completing the task of picking it up."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: Both arms are free, and there is unobstructed lateral access to the sides of box_2 which rests on top of box_1. Sufficient clearance exists so the robot can bring both end-effectors in contact with the box without colliding with other objects or the table.
parsed_json.Postcondition: Box_2 is gently constrained between the inner surfaces of the robot’s two palms, preventing accidental sliding while the attachment to box_1 is released.

parsed_json.Precondition: Box_2 is already stabilized by the robot. The attachment (e.g., light tape) can be overcome by an upward and slight twisting pull. No objects block the vertical lift path above box_2.
parsed_json.Postcondition: Box_2 is fully detached from box_1 and securely held in mid-air by both end-effectors.

parsed_json.Target: On the table, front-right of box_1
parsed_json.Precondition: Robot is holding box_2. The designated table region front-right of box_1 is clear and large enough (≥30×30 cm) to accommodate the box without overhang.
parsed_json.Postcondition: Box_2 rests stably on the cleared tabletop area, leaving box_1 completely exposed and accessible. The robot releases its hold on box_2.

parsed_json.Precondition: Box_1 is now free of any object above it. Both arms can approach its lateral faces without obstruction, and there is vertical clearance to lift the box.
parsed_json.Postcondition: Box_1 (the darker box) is securely held off the table by the robot’s two end-effectors, completing the task of picking it up.
